creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
On Mon, 21 Feb 2000 tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:

> Contacted maintainer with no response.

Hi, Tsuguru-san.  Your mail arrived at:  Thu, 17 Feb 2000 14:34:32 -0500
(EST). I hadn't yet had a chance to review your patches.  Thank you for
your contribution, but in the future please give me a bit more time.
__
Trevor Johnson
